'''竏嗚-ng-k-y''' ('''kajangkeyoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:wakesurf|wakesurf]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-ng-k-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:wakesurf|wakesurf]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 竏嗚-ng-k-y
|-
! Lemma
| kajangkeyoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thijangkeyoko|thijangkeyoko]] || [[word:jijangkeyoko|jijangkeyoko]] || [[word:shijangkeyoko|shijangkeyoko]] || [[word:kijangkeyoko|kijangkeyoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthujangkeyoko|thuthujangkeyoko]] || [[word:jujujangkeyoko|jujujangkeyoko]] || [[word:shushujangkeyoko|shushujangkeyoko]] || [[word:kukujangkeyoko|kukujangkeyoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thojangkeyoko|thojangkeyoko]] || [[word:jojangkeyoko|jojangkeyoko]] || [[word:shojangkeyoko|shojangkeyoko]] || [[word:kojangkeyoko|kojangkeyoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thﾃｦjangkeyoko|thﾃｦjangkeyoko]] || [[word:jﾃｦjangkeyoko|jﾃｦjangkeyoko]] || [[word:shﾃｦjangkeyoko|shﾃｦjangkeyoko]] || [[word:kﾃｦjangkeyoko|kﾃｦjangkeyoko]]
|-

|-

|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thajangkeyoko|thajangkeyoko]] || [[word:jajangkeyoko|jajangkeyoko]] || [[word:shajangkeyoko|shajangkeyoko]] || [[word:kajangkeyoko|kajangkeyoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

|-
